category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Saudi Arabia) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Saudi requirements: SASO technical regulations, mandatory SABER registration with Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and per-shipment Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC), SASO/IEC 62133 cell safety, EMC and electrical safety, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与沙特要求对照：SASO技术法规、强制性SABER注册（产品符合证书PCoC及逐批装运符合证书SCoC）、SASO/IEC 62133电芯安全、EMC及电气安全、UN 38.3运输，以及本地进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與沙特要求對照：SASO技術法規、強制性SABER註冊（產品符合證書PCoC及逐批裝運符合證書SCoC）、SASO/IEC 62133電芯安全、EMC及電氣安全、UN 38.3運輸，以及本地進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters must register the product on the Saudi SABER platform to obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and a per-shipment Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC), demonstrate conformity with the applicable SASO technical regulation (including SASO-adopted IEC 62133 cell safety), and ship through a Saudi-established importer — none of which are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口商须在沙特SABER平台注册产品，取得产品符合证书（PCoC）及逐批装运符合证书（SCoC），证明符合适用的SASO技术法规（包括SASO采纳的IEC 62133电芯安全标准），并通过在沙特设立的进口商发货——上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商須在沙特SABER平台註冊產品，取得產品符合證書（PCoC）及逐批裝運符合證書（SCoC），證明符合適用的SASO技術法規（包括SASO採納的IEC 62133電芯安全標準），並通過在沙特設立的進口商發貨——上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Official URLs from saso.gov.sa, saber.sa, iec.ch, unece.org, or equivalent authority sources only. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Does China's GB 31241 meet Saudi Arabia's requirements for lithium battery safety?
q.zh: 中国GB 31241是否满足沙特锂电池安全要求？
q.zht: 中國GB 31241是否滿足沙特鋰電池安全要求？

a.en: No. Saudi Arabia requires conformity with the applicable SASO technical regulation, which for portable lithium cells and packs relies on SASO-adopted IEC 62133. The product must be registered on the SABER platform to obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) issued by a SASO-notified conformity assessment body, plus a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for each consignment. A GB 31241 test report alone is not sufficient for Saudi market access, and a Saudi-established importer must hold the SABER records.
a.zh: 不。沙特要求符合适用的SASO技术法规，对便携式锂电芯和电池组而言依据SASO采纳的IEC 62133。产品须在SABER平台注册，由SASO认可的合格评定机构签发产品符合证书（PCoC），并对每批货物取得装运符合证书（SCoC）。仅凭GB 31241测试报告不足以进入沙特市场，且须由在沙特设立的进口商持有SABER记录。
a.zht: 不。沙特要求符合適用的SASO技術法規，對便攜式鋰電芯和電池組而言依據SASO採納的IEC 62133。產品須在SABER平台註冊，由SASO認可的合格評定機構簽發產品符合證書（PCoC），並對每批貨物取得裝運符合證書（SCoC）。僅憑GB 31241測試報告不足以進入沙特市場，且須由在沙特設立的進口商持有SABER記錄。

q.en: What is the SABER platform and what does it require from lithium battery exporters?
q.zh: SABER平台是什么，对锂电池出口商有哪些要求？
q.zht: SABER平台是什麼，對鋰電池出口商有哪些要求？

a.en: SABER is Saudi Arabia's mandatory online conformity platform operated under SASO. For regulated products, a Saudi importer registers the product and obtains a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) valid for one year from a SASO-notified certification body, then requests a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for every consignment before customs clearance. The system links the technical file, test reports against SASO-adopted standards, and the importer of record. There is no equivalent SABER-style two-tier (product + per-shipment) electronic conformity gateway in Chinese domestic export requirements.
a.zh: SABER是沙特在SASO下运营的强制性在线符合性平台。对受监管产品，沙特进口商须注册产品，从SASO认可的认证机构取得有效期一年的产品符合证书（PCoC），随后在每批货物清关前申请装运符合证书（SCoC）。系统将技术文件、依据SASO采纳标准的检测报告及登记进口商关联。中国国内出口要求中没有等同于SABER式（产品+逐批装运）两级电子符合性门户的制度。
a.zht: SABER是沙特在SASO下運營的強制性在線符合性平台。對受監管產品，沙特進口商須註冊產品，從SASO認可的認證機構取得有效期一年的產品符合證書（PCoC），隨後在每批貨物清關前申請裝運符合證書（SCoC）。系統將技術文件、依據SASO採納標準的檢測報告及登記進口商關聯。中國國內出口要求中沒有等同於SABER式（產品+逐批裝運）兩級電子符合性門戶的制度。
